# AI Studio Android Release Gate MCP

Paid remote MCP for AI Studio Android release gate MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://aistudioandroidreleasegate.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://aistudioandroidreleasegate.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://aistudioandroidreleasegate.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/ai-studio-android-release-gate-mcp

Use case: AI Studio Android release gate MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_android_release_gate, explain_permission_blocker, issue_release_receipt, summarize_device_matrix, export_release_log
